title: Void Rot
description: A horror survival modpack built for Forge 1.20.1. Stalkers, dwellers, cursed structures, and a world that never lets you feel safe.
body:
# ☠ Void Rot

A horror survival modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge).

Stalkers. Dwellers. Cursed structures. Things that watch you from the dark.

The world feels normal at first. It won't stay that way.

---

**Play with headphones. Good luck.**
